session.goal: Continue session-suite work after repo/session relocation; maintain pi-relocate/pi-move boundaries and session move behavior.

turn.summary: Prior completed turn before turnlog init: in pi-relocate, removed /relocate-repo and /relocate-repos, documented that filesystem moves live in pi-move /move <target>, added top-level operationType/tool fields to relocation records, validated with npx tsc --noEmit, closed related tickets, and left @ as empty child on top of completed main change.

Created pi-turnlog tickets for smoother agent provenance workflows: auto-init on record, auto-start on record, one-shot init/start/record auto workflow, and auto-init safety/config policy. Noted pi-turnlog already had pre-existing ticket directory renames and pt-47df before these new ticket files.

Committed and pushed pi-turnlog ticket updates. Described jj change as 'Track turnlog auto-record workflow tickets', moved main to the completed change, created an empty child working copy, exported to Git, attached Git HEAD to main, reset mixed, pushed origin/main, and verified clean jj/git status with @ empty and @- on main/main@origin.

Aligned and pushed pi-relocate. Committed current pi-relocate working copy as 'Track pi-move bucket relocation ticket', moved main to the completed change, created an empty child @, exported to Git, attached HEAD to main, reset mixed, pushed origin/main, and verified clean jj/git status with @ empty and @- on main/main@origin.
